basic_details.job_title: DCPU Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Outreach Worker and Case Worker Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Chengalpattu (DCPU Chengalpattu)
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Chengalpattu (DCPU Chengalpattu) Recruitment 2026: District Child Protection Unit Chengalpattu has released the official notification for 3 Outreach Worker and Case Worker posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years for all posts. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for any age relaxation rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate preferably in B.A in Social Work / Computer Sciences / Information Technology / Community Sociology / Social Sciences, 12th passed from a recognized Board
qualification.details: Outreach Worker: Graduate preferably in B.A in Social Work / Computer Sciences / Information Technology / Community Sociology / Social Sciences from a recognized university. Proficiency in Computers. Preference may be given to personnel having experience of working in Emergency Helplines. Weightage for experienced candidates. Case Worker: 12th passed from a recognized Board / Equivalent Board. Good Communication Skills. Preference may be given to personnel of working in Emergency Helplines. Weightage for experienced candidates.

salary_details.details: Outreach Worker: Rs. 21,000/- per month Case Worker: Rs. 18,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Chengalpattu Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://chengalpattu.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download DCPU Chengalpattu Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download DCPU Chengalpattu Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.district_child_protection_unit_chengalpa: Graduate preferably in B.A in Social Work / Computer Sciences / Information Technology / Community Sociology / Social Sciences, 12th passed from a recognized Board

content_sections.heading: DCPU Chengalpattu Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the DCPU Chengalpattu Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download DCPU Chengalpattu Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DCPU Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Outreach Worker: Graduate preferably in B.A in Social Work / Computer Sciences / Information Technology / Community Sociology / Social Sciences from a recognized university. Proficiency in Computers. Preference may be given to personnel having experience of working in Emergency Helplines. Weightage for experienced candidates. Case Worker: 12th passed from a recognized Board / Equivalent Board. Good Communication Skills. Preference may be given to personnel of working in Emergency Helplines. Weightage for experienced candidates.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years for all posts. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for any age relaxation rules.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Outreach Worker: Rs. 21,000/- per month Case Worker: Rs. 18,000/- per month

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Chengalpattu Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: http://chengalpattu.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the DCPU Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026 is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Outreach Worker and Case Worker posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced by the District Child Protection Unit Chengalpattu for the posts of Outreach Worker (2 vacancies) and Case Worker (1 vacancy).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Outreach Worker post?
faq.answer: For the Outreach Worker position, candidates must be graduates, preferably with a B.A. in Social Work, Computer Sciences, Information Technology, Community Sociology, or Social Sciences. Proficiency in computers is also required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for the Case Worker post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Case Worker post, candidates must have passed the 12th grade from a recognized Board or an equivalent board. Good communication skills are essential.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts announced by DCPU Chengalpattu is 42 years. Specific age relaxation details are not provided and should be checked in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Outreach Worker and Case Worker positions?
faq.answer: The selected Outreach Worker will receive a salary of Rs. 21,000/- per month, while the Case Worker will be paid Rs. 18,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by DCPU Chengalpattu.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for DCPU Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Outreach Worker and Case Worker posts primarily involves Document Verification. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any further details.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for these government jobs?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Child Protection Unit Chengalpattu, which is http://chengalpattu.nic.in. Links are also provided in the Important Links section.
